query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN bio IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_bio, SUM(CASE WHEN avatarUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_avatar, SUM(CASE WHEN s3AvatarUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_s3_avatar, SUM(CASE WHEN socialStatsJson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_social_stats, SUM(CASE WHEN richBioJson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_rich_bio, SUM(CASE WHEN websitesJson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_websites, SUM(CASE WHEN enrichedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enriched FROM author_profiles
